hero.subhead: Lawn care, hardscape, design — one Sterling crew, one phone number, nine years in the neighborhood.

services.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.blurb: Weekly mowing, edging, trimming, and weed control. Striped lines, sharp borders, no torn-up sod.

services.title: Mulch, Beds & Planting
services.blurb: Fresh mulch installed clean. Beds reshaped, plants chosen for NoVA seasons, gardens that look right in May and November.

services.title: Hardscape & Patios
services.blurb: Paver patios, walkways, and stone work that stay level for years. Class A licensed means we build it right the first time.

services.title: Tree & Shrub Care
services.blurb: Sculpted shrubs, healthy trees, clean lines. Pruning, shaping, removal — done by a crew who knows what each species wants.

services.title: Irrigation Systems
services.blurb: Install new sprinkler systems or fix the one that's been spraying the driveway since 2019. Seasonal start-up and shutdown too.

services.title: Snow Plowing & Water Features
services.blurb: Same crew, four seasons. Winter snow + ice clearing for driveways and walkways. Spring through fall: water features and decorative installs.

process.title: Free on-site estimate
process.description: Call or fill out the form. Victor or a senior crew lead walks the property within a few days, listens to what you want, and gives you a real number — not a guess.

process.title: Design + scope approval
process.description: For installs and hardscape we sketch the plan, talk material choices, and lock the timeline. For maintenance, we agree on a schedule and start the next week.

process.title: Install + walk-through
process.description: Crew shows up when we said we'd show up. Job gets done. We walk it with you before we leave — anything off, we fix it the same day.

reviews_featured.author: Matt Tengs
reviews_featured.text: Fantastic from start to finish. KVA installed a backyard paver patio with two walkways attached. They also removed old sod and planted new grass seed in the front and back of my home. The quality and attention to detail was second to none.

reviews_featured.author: Francisco Ruben
reviews_featured.text: They had to re-level an existing walkway and two back patios. They did an excellent job. After they were done we were surprised because we had not remembered how good the walkway and patios looked when they were clean and level! I would recommend them to anyone.

reviews_featured.author: Jacob Jenkins
reviews_featured.text: We had a great experience with KVA. Not only did they provide a great end-product, they offered suggestions along the way that indicated they weren't just trying to finish the job, but they wanted the best look for our landscaping.

reviews_featured.author: Jay North
reviews_featured.text: I recently hired KVA for plant trimming and mulch installation. These guys did a bang-up job. I was super impressed with the quality of mulch and the professional installation. Nice guys too.

reviews_featured.author: Verified Thumbtack customer
reviews_featured.text: They provided superior quality work at a fair price. The crew were diligent workers and the result speaks for itself.

reviews_featured.author: Marc Misleh
reviews_featured.text: Great communication. Quality work. Give them a try, you won't be disappointed.

about.headline: One Sterling crew. Nine years. Every yard treated like a neighbor's.
about.body: KVA Landscaping is run by Victor Amaya out of Sterling, VA. We have been doing landscape work in Loudoun and Fairfax for nine years — the same crew, the same number, the same standards. We are a Class A licensed Virginia contractor, which means we can pull permits and do hardscape that lasts, not just mow and run. Most of our work is for homeowners within ten miles of Sterling — Herndon, Leesburg, Ashburn, Reston — plus a handful of property managers we have been with for years. We show up when we said we would, we do good work, and we come back when you call.

estimate_form.headline: Get a free, no-pressure estimate.
estimate_form.subhead: Tell us what you need and we will be in touch within a business day — usually faster. Sterling, Herndon, Leesburg, Ashburn, Reston, and around.

estimate_form.success_message: Thanks — we got it. Victor or a senior crew lead will text or call you within one business day to set up a walk-through.
